summary: Separate Vite web and Tauri desktop build modes so the web-only OpenSCAD WebAssembly artifact pair is never copied into desktop resources or installers.
specSections: FR-4.1 native and WebAssembly engine implementations

decisions.topic: Exclude the separately fetched GPL web engine from desktop application resources
decisions.decision: Keep the normal Vite build public directory for the static web target, add a desktop Vite mode whose publicDir is false, and require Tauri's beforeBuildCommand to invoke only build:desktop. Retain one typed mode-selection function as the executable policy seam.
decisions.rationale: Vite copies public files into dist by default, and Tauri embeds dist into each desktop application. Without a mode split, staging the separately fetched OpenSCAD WASM pair for the web would silently place the unused GPL engine inside every native installer, contradicting A-2 and increasing package size. Desktop uses only NativeEngineService and must not carry the web engine artifact.

testEvidence.criterion: Web builds copy public engine assets, while every Tauri build uses a desktop mode that disables public-directory copying.
testEvidence.test: Assert the Vite mode selector returns public for web and false for desktop, require the exact build:desktop script, and require Tauri's pre-build command to invoke it.

red.outcome: RED: the focused contract failed because no mode selector existed; the existing single build path copied public assets for both web and Tauri.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/desktop-public-assets.test.ts; pnpm.cmd exec biome check vite.config.ts tests/scripts/desktop-public-assets.test.ts package.json src/desktop-shell/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json; pnpm.cmd typecheck; node scripts/check-source-policy.mjs; git diff --check
green.outcome: GREEN: the focused build-isolation contract passed 1/1 in 570 ms; scoped Biome, strict TypeScript, source-policy, and diff gates exited 0. Actual web/desktop dist contents remain queued for the post-CivicCast aggregate build gate.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
